headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Chubb (CB) After Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether Chubb at around US$332.94 is still offering value, or if most of the easy gains are already behind it, this breakdown is designed to help you weigh that up. The share price performance has been steady, with returns of 1.4% over the last 7 days, 2.4% over 30 days, 7.4% year to date and 19.5% over the past year, building on 73.5% over 3 years and 121.5% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Chubb's position in global insurance markets and how investors are...

headline: Chubb Limited (CB) – Among the Best Cheap Dividend Stocks to Buy
summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) is included among the 15 Best Cheap Dividend Stocks to Buy. On April 8, Barclays raised its price recommendation on Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) to $374 from $339. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The change came as part of a Q1 preview for the insurance group. The analyst said […]
